name: Autumn Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and core the apples and pears, peeling if desired.
2. Cut into one inch thick chunks.
3. Slice bananas 1/2 inch thick.
4. Wash grapes and cut in half.
5. Combine fruits and almonds in a salad bowl.
6. Mix yogurt with spices and cider.
7. Pour over fruit salad and stir to coat the fruits evenly.
8. Chill.
